title: Dear
text-1: For Regulatory Compliance purposes we need to ask you to kindly answer the following questions:
text-2:
1) Did anyone call you and incentivize you to register on IQ OPTION before you have been registered? If so, please let us know the details.

2) Have you seen any advertising materials in accordance with which you have been promised any fixed income? If yes, please let us know the details.

3) Did you see any banners or materials on the internet with links to our company saying that trading on cryptocurrency is not risky?
questions: Thank you for your help and cooperation!
